infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Cenaiva uses your microphone so you can speak restaurant and booking requests.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Cenaiva uses your location to find nearby restaurants.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Cenaiva may use speech recognition to process spoken restaurant and booking requests.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Cenaiva uses your photo library so you can attach photos to receipts, reviews, and your profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Cenaiva saves photos you capture to your photo library when you tap save.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Cenaiva adds your reservation to your primary calendar so you don't forget your dine-in time.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Cenaiva adds your reservation to your primary calendar so you don't forget your dine-in time.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Cenaiva needs to write your reservation event to your primary calendar.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Cenaiva to access your camera so you can scan receipts and capture restaurant review snaps.

plugins.photosPermission: Cenaiva needs access to your photo library so you can choose an image for your restaurant post.
Cenaiva needs access to your photo library so it can save your finished snap.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Cenaiva needs permission to save your finished snap to your camera roll.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Cenaiva uses your location to find nearby restaurants.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Cenaiva uses your location to find nearby restaurants.

plugins.microphonePermission: Cenaiva uses your microphone so you can speak restaurant and booking requests.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Cenaiva may use speech recognition to process spoken restaurant and booking requests.

plugins.microphonePermission: Cenaiva uses your microphone so you can speak restaurant and booking requests.

plugins.calendarPermission: Cenaiva adds your reservation to your primary calendar so you don't forget your dine-in time.
